      </defs>
      <style>
        .box{fill:#fff;stroke:#e3e1da;stroke-width:1.5}
        .hi{fill:#eef6f6;stroke:#1f6f78;stroke-width:1.6}
        .hot{fill:#fdf2e9;stroke:#b8531a;stroke-width:1.6}
        .txt{font-family:sans-serif;font-size:14px;fill:#1a1a1a}
        .sm{font-family:monospace;font-size:12px;fill:#555}
        .edge{stroke:#1f6f78;stroke-width:2.2;fill:none;marker-end:url(#agArrow)}

      <rect x="35" y="82" width="150" height="62" rx="12" class="hi"/>
